title: Teladoc projects $2.47B–$2.59B revenue in 2026 while advancing AI, insurance, and international growth
text: Teladoc projects $2.47B–$2.59B revenue in 2026 while advancing AI, insurance, and international growth. Q1 2026 Integrated Care Growth: Q4 2025 Integrated Care segment revenue grew 4.7% year-over-year. Headwind from subscriptions to visits is moderating, with over 50% of Virtual Care revenues now from visits. Visit growth expected to drive future growth. International Performance: International revenues grew double digits over prior year, including 30% increase from hybrid care models providing virtual services in physical settings. Enhanced Services: New enhanced 24/7 care offering broadens services and addresses issues that might previously require specialist referrals. Full Year 2026 Guidance: Integrated Care revenue growth of 0.8% to 3.5%. Analyst Sentiment: 16 analysts rate TDOC as Hold on average with 12-month price target of $7.47. Citi raised price target to $7 from $6 post-Q1 earnings with Neutral rating.
